description_long: This is a bulbous, double-handled vase with a wide, rounded body and a narrow, flared neck. The surface is subtly faceted, giving it a polygonal, geometric appearance, and it is finished in a pale, off-white color. Two small, circular handles are symmetrically placed on opposite sides of the body, allowing for easy lifting or decorative display. One side of the vase features faint, vertically aligned diamond-shaped patterns bordered by delicate lines, adding a touch of ornamentation. The neck is smooth and transitions gracefully into the body, while the base is flat for stable placement. The overall design suggests a blend of utilitarian and decorative purposes, suitable for urban public or private spaces.
description: A pale, faceted vase with a rounded body, flared neck, and two small side handles, featuring subtle diamond-patterned ornamentation on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rounded body, both side handles, and the flared neck with no visible pattern.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting one handle and the smooth, faceted surface with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both handles and the faint diamond-shaped decorative pattern on the body.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the opposite handle and the plain, faceted surface.
